decision.title: Payload + Supabase + Vercel
decision.summary: Use Payload CMS (with-vercel-website template) on Vercel with PostgreSQL hosted on Supabase. Swap template DB env from Neon to Supabase connection string when implementing.
decision.impact: All schema and migrations target Postgres via Payload using **`@payloadcms/db-postgres`** (node `pg`) for reliable Supabase compatibility; avoid the template’s Neon/WebSocket (`db-vercel-postgres`) driver against Supabase poolers. Media: Supabase Storage (S3 API, bucket `media`) via @payloadcms/storage-s3 when env is set; otherwise local `public/media` for dev.

decision.title: Where internal process documentation lives
decision.summary: Repo may stay **public** for transparency if we avoid secrets and customer PII in commits. High-level `.planning/` is OK; detailed SOPs can move to private repo, Notion, or Payload admin-only collections. Customers only see public pages + appropriate forms—not internal quotes or ops tools.
decision.impact: Good-faith, pragmatic process writing; classify sensitive detail out of public git.

decision.title: CRM: EngageBay (validate before production)
decision.summary: Default choice **EngageBay** for one shared org, mixed user email domains, marketing + CRM. **Review** official API, webhooks, and trial limits in `engagebay-integration-review.md` before locking integrations. HubSpot remains a fallback if API/automation gaps block the roadmap.
decision.impact: Lead sync, sequences, and deals target EngageBay REST API from server-side routes; keys in env only.

decision.title: Quote system: internal-only, feature-flagged
decision.summary: Quotes capture job size, description, soiling level, and (later) economics (labor, materials, margin, Texas sales tax per CPA guidance). **Not** shown to customers until explicitly designed. Access restricted to allowlisted staff emails (bg/pb/de grimetime.local initially); implement with env flags `QUOTES_INTERNAL_ENABLED` + `QUOTES_INTERNAL_EMAILS`.
decision.impact: Public site stays trust + booking-style intake. **v1:** Payload `quotes` collection (admin group Internal) gated by `QUOTES_INTERNAL_ENABLED` + `QUOTES_INTERNAL_EMAILS`. Labor/material/tax automation remains future work per workflow doc.

decision.title: Shared passwords and API keys for third-party tools
decision.summary: Requirement acknowledged: team needs one place to view/maintain logins for other systems. Do not store plaintext in content collections without an encryption/security review. Options: team password manager (1Password/Bitwarden), Payload encrypted fields + RBAC, or dedicated secrets patterns.
decision.impact: May remain process + external tool for v1; in-app vault only after threat model.
